title: glandularia thymoides
intro: Glandularia thymoides, also known as Rosy Verbena, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system. Glandularia thymoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
